inputs.label: Turbine Inlet Enthalpy (h₁)
inputs.businessContext: Specific enthalpy of steam at turbine inlet (superheated conditions)

label_i18n.es: Entalpía de entrada de la turbina (h₁)

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific enthalpy of steam at turbine inlet (superheated conditions)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Türbin girişinde buharın özgül entalpisi (kızgın buhar koşulları)
businessContext_i18n.de: Spezifische Enthalpie des Dampfes am Turbineneintritt (überhitzter Zustand)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Enthalpie spécifique de la vapeur à l'entrée de la turbine (conditions surchauffées)
businessContext_i18n.es: Entalpía específica del vapor en la entrada de la turbina (condiciones de sobrecalentamiento)

inputs.label: Isentropic Turbine Exit Enthalpy (h₂ₛ)
inputs.businessContext: Specific enthalpy at turbine exit assuming isentropic expansion

label_i18n.fr: Enthalpie de sortie de turbine isentropique (h₂ₛ)
label_i18n.es: Entalpía de salida isentrópica de la turbina (h₂ₛ)

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific enthalpy at turbine exit assuming isentropic expansion
businessContext_i18n.tr: İzantropik genişleme varsayımıyla türbin çıkışındaki özgül entalpi
businessContext_i18n.de: Spezifische Enthalpie am Turbinenaustritt bei isentroper Expansion
businessContext_i18n.fr: Enthalpie spécifique à la sortie de la turbine en supposant une détente isentropique
businessContext_i18n.es: Entalpía específica en la salida de la turbina asumiendo expansión isentrópica

inputs.label: Condenser Outlet Enthalpy (h₃)
inputs.businessContext: Specific enthalpy of saturated liquid leaving the condenser

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific enthalpy of saturated liquid leaving the condenser
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yoğuşturucudan çıkan doymuş sıvının özgül entalpisi
businessContext_i18n.de: Spezifische Enthalpie der gesättigten Flüssigkeit am Kondensatoraustritt
businessContext_i18n.fr: Enthalpie spécifique du liquide saturé sortant du condenseur
businessContext_i18n.es: Entalpía específica del líquido saturado que sale del condensador

inputs.label: Isentropic Pump Exit Enthalpy (h₄ₛ)
inputs.businessContext: Specific enthalpy at pump exit assuming isentropic compression

label_i18n.fr: Enthalpie de sortie de pompe isentropique (h₄ₛ)
label_i18n.es: Entalpía de salida de la bomba isentrópica (h₄ₛ)

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific enthalpy at pump exit assuming isentropic compression
businessContext_i18n.tr: İzantropik sıkıştırma varsayımıyla pompa çıkışındaki özgül entalpi
businessContext_i18n.de: Spezifische Enthalpie am Pumpenaustritt bei isentroper Verdichtung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Enthalpie spécifique à la sortie de la pompe en supposant une compression isentropique
businessContext_i18n.es: Entalpía específica a la salida de la bomba asumiendo compresión isentrópica

inputs.label: Turbine Isentropic Efficiency (ηₜ)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of actual turbine work to isentropic work (0–1)

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of actual turbine work to isentropic work (0–1)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerçek türbin işinin izantropik işe oranı (0–1)
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis der tatsächlichen Turbinenarbeit zur isentropen Arbeit (0–1)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport du travail réel de la turbine au travail isentropique (0–1)
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación entre el trabajo real de la turbina y el trabajo isentrópico (0–1)

inputs.label: Pump Isentropic Efficiency (ηₚ)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of isentropic pump work to actual pump work (0–1)

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of isentropic pump work to actual pump work (0–1)
businessContext_i18n.tr: İzantropik pompa işinin gerçek pompa işine oranı (0–1)
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis der isentropen Pumpenarbeit zur tatsächlichen Pumpenarbeit (0–1)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport du travail isentropique de la pompe au travail réel de la pompe (0–1)
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación entre el trabajo isentrópico de la bomba y el trabajo real (0–1)

formulas.thermalEfficiency: ((turbineInletEnthalpy - turbineExitIsentropicEnthalpy) * turbineEfficiency - (pumpExitIsentropicEnthalpy - condenserOutletEnthalpy) / pumpEfficiency) / ((turbineInletEnthalpy - condenserOutletEnthalpy) - (pumpExitIsentropicEnthalpy - condenserOutletEnthalpy) / pumpEfficiency)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
